sections.sectionTitle: Jerusalem A Ngei A Batkik Ding Kamciamna

verses.text: Vanglian Topa in kei tungah thu hong genin
amah in, “Jerusalem mite ka itluatna hangin Jerusalem khuapi ka huh nuam mahmah a, hih banga ka itluatna in a galte tungah ka heh hong suaksak hi
Ka khuapi siangtho Jerusalem-ah ciahkikin ka teng ding hi. A citak khuapi, ci-in minthang ding a, Vanglian Topa' mual pen mual siangtho kici ding hi
Jerusalem khuapi kongzing leh lamkabomte-ah a tu dingin puteekte omkik ding a, teeklua kisa-in ciangkhut khunin pai ding uh hi
Kongzing khempeuhah numei naupang kimawlin phezaizai ding uh hi
“Tu-a a omlai note-a' dingin hih thu ahi theilo ding tawh a kibat hangin kei-a' dingin ahi mawh ding thu hilo hi
Nisuahna leh nitumna gamte panin ka mite ka honkhia ding a
Jerusalem khuasungah ka tun'pihkik ding hi. Amaute pen keima mi hi-in, kei zong amau' Pasian ka hi ding a, amau tawh ka thuciamnate limtakin ka zui ding hi
“Thakhauhin lungsim hang un. Ka biakinn a kilamkikna ding a bul a kiphuh laitakin kamsangte in a gen thute mah a za na hi uh hi
Tua hun ma-in mi ahi a, ganhing ahi zongin na a sem dingin kuamah in cial zolo a, galte kihtakna hangin kuamah a ututin om theilo hi. Mi khatlekhat ka kidosak hi
Ahi zongin tu-in a suaktalai hih minamte, nidangate ka bangsak kei ding hi
Lungnuam takin lokho singpua-in nuam a sa ding uh hi. Leengguite gahpha ding a, guah tampi zu-in lo-ah an tampi piang ding a, a suaktalai ka minamte tungah hih bang thupha khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi

A beisa hunah, Judah gammite leh Israel gammite pen, minam dangte in kihamsiatna-in zang uh a, ‘Judah leh Israel-te' thuak bangin thuak un,’ kici uh hi. Ahi zongin note kong honkhia ding a, tu-in midangte in, ‘Judah leh Israel bangin thupha ngah un,’ ci-in thupha kipiakna-in zang ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin na lungsim uh hangsak un la lau kei un
“Na pu na pate un kei hong hehsak ciangin amaute tungah siatna tun'sak ding ka ngaihsun a, ka lungsim ka khiam het kei hi
Ahi zongin tu-in Jerusalem khua mite leh Judah gammite tungah thupha piak ding ka ngaihsun hi. Tua ahih ciangin lunghimawh kei un
Hih bangin note gamta un: Note khatlekhat tungah thuman thutak kam kipau un. Thukhenna zumah, kilemna a piangsak ding thutang zang un
Khatlekhat kisiatsakna ding vaihawm kei un la, a manlopi-in teci pangin kiciam kei un. Zuauna, thumanlohna, leh kibawlsiatnate ka deih kei hi,” hong ci hi
Vanglian Topa in kei tungah thu hong genin

amah in, “Kha lina, kha ngana, kha sagihna, leh kha sawmna sunga antan'nate pen, Judah gammite-a' dingin lungdamin kipakin pawi bawlna hun suak ta ding hi. Tua ahih manin thuman leh kilemna deih pha un,” hong ci hi
Vanglian Topa in hih bangin ci hi: “Minam liante leh khuapi liante panin Jerusalem-ah mi hong pai hun hong tung ding hi
Khuapi khata om mite in khuapi danga om mite kiangah, ‘Vanglian Topa bia-in ama tung panin thupha ka ngen ding uh hi. Hong zui un,’ ci ding uh hi
A vanglian a thahat minamte zong Vanglian Topa a bia ding leh ama tung panin thupha a ngen dingin Jerusalem-ah hong pai ding uh hi
Tua hun ciangin minam tuamtuamte sung panin mi sawm, Jew mi khat kiangah hong pai-in, ‘Pasian in nang hong ompihna thu za ka hih manun na nung hong zuisak in,’ ci-in thum ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
